articles.title: North Andover police working to get body cameras after Kelsey Fitzsimmons shooting
articles.description:
North Andover will "actively seek grant funding to help offset the direct taxpayer expense," Town Manager Melissa Rodrigues said.

The post North Andover police working to get body cameras after Kelsey Fitzsimmons shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: North Andover police plan to implement body cameras following the Kelsey Fitzsimmons shooting.
Town Manager Melissa Rodrigues announced efforts to secure grant funding to reduce taxpayer costs.
The initiative aims to enhance transparency and accountability in local law enforcement.

articles.title: US employers added a surprisingly strong 178,000 jobs last month
articles.description:
The Labor Department reported Friday that hiring marked a turnaround from the loss of 133,000 jobs in February.

The post US employers added a surprisingly strong 178,000 jobs last month appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US employers added 178,000 jobs in March, reversing February's loss of 133,000 jobs.
Boston's job market benefits from this growth, potentially reducing local unemployment rates.
Increased hiring may boost consumer spending and economic stability for Boston residents.

articles.title: Xander Bogaerts talks Roman Anthony, pressure from fans in his return to Fenway Park
articles.description:
"It makes you see that time flies.”

The post Xander Bogaerts talks Roman Anthony, pressure from fans in his return to Fenway Park appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Xander Bogaerts returned to Fenway Park, reflecting on his time with the Red Sox.
Bogaerts discussed the pressure on rookie Roman Anthony, who debuted in 2023.
Fans expressed mixed emotions, highlighting the ongoing connection to former players.

articles.title: 1 crew member rescued after U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran, officials tell AP
articles.description:
Officials say a U.S. fighter jet has been shot down in Iran and one crew member was rescued

The post 1 crew member rescued after U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran, officials tell AP appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran; one crew member rescued.
Rescue operation highlights risks for military personnel involved in overseas missions.
Local families of service members may feel increased anxiety about safety.
